xslControl S3 class

Source: R/xslControl-class.R
xslControl-class.Rd

Control arguments for xsl_run()

Usage

xslControl(
  reps = 1,
  start_matrix = NULL,
  test_noise = 0,
  n_sim = 500,
  verbose = FALSE
)

new_xslControl(x = list())

Arguments

reps

Number of times to repeat training

start_matrix

Starting matrix

test_noise

Test noise

n_sim

Number of simulations for stochastic models

verbose

Verbosity

x

List with elements train, test, accuracy, n_subj, label, condition

Value

An object of class xslControl

On this page
